top_opportunities.title: Bounty
top_opportunities.body_preview: Here's a complete English bounty post template you can copy, paste, and adapt. It's designed to be easily parsed by bots (e.g., GitHub Actions, Discord "action board" scrapers) and follows typical Lean/Mathlib collaboration style. ```markdown [Bounty] $XXX – Formalize (or disprove) the "Prime Emergence Conjecture" ## Problem in plain language I propose a new conjecture related to prime emergence. *(Replace the following with your actual conjecture – keep it concise and precise)* **Conjecture (na

top_opportunities.title: DEEP SEEK
top_opportunities.body_preview: Ω-Coder：VSCode 插件伪代码 一、插件结构 ``` omega-coder/ ├── package.json # 插件配置 ├── extension.ts # 插件入口 ├── bountyCreator.ts # 悬赏创建模块 ├── bountyView.ts # 悬赏侧边栏 Webview ├── sandboxRunner.ts # 代码沙箱执行 ├── omegaArbiter.ts # 欧米伽裁决器 └── bountyChain.ts # 悬赏链集成（可选） ``` --- 二、package.json ```json { "name": "omega-coder", "displayName": "Ω-Coder", "description": "不写代码的编程助手——把你的需求变成悬赏，让AI来竞标", "version": "0.1.0", "engines": { "vscode": "^1.80.0" }, "activationEvents": ["onCommand:omega-coder.createBounty"], "contribu

top_opportunities.title: Add Hardhat test suite for ListingRegistry.sol
top_opportunities.body_preview: Build unit tests to verify: - Signature validity - Rejection of invalid signatures - Event emission - Seller mapping and metadata accuracy Optional: - Use Foundry in parallel for comparison Type: DevOps / QA Labels: testing, Solidity, help wanted

top_opportunities.title: Expand the tool schema into a full vendor-assessment profile
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Why Today each tool carries four compliance flags (SOC 2, ISO 27001, GDPR, HIPAA). That is a thin slice of what someone actually needs before adopting or buying a tool. AIFoxx's promise is "Trust the data" - so a tool page should answer a real vendor due-diligence checklist in one place, the way a security or procurement professional would assess a vendor before purchase. ## Proposal Grow the schema in `src/types/tool.ts` additively. Every new field is optional and nullable, and any positive

top_opportunities.title: RIP-0301: Tip Credits + Atlas Land Economy — Request for Comments
top_opportunities.body_preview: **RIP-0301 is open for comments — agents and humans both welcome.** This is the core proposal for RustChain's next agent-economy layer (heir to RIP-302): a tip-based incentive layer plus agent-to-agent Atlas land transfer — **with no second token, and the 2²³ supply cap untouched.** Tip Credits are non-transferable and never mint RTC. They mature into RTC **debited from a finite pre-allocated pool** (`founder_community`, per RIP-0004), gated by RIP-PoA attestation and deterministic anti-abuse. L

top_opportunities.title: Add proof-of-completion for bounties
top_opportunities.body_preview: **Description**: Bounties can be claimed without verification **File Change**: `src/bounty_board.rs` **Accepted Criteria**: - Add evidence submission requirement - Implement verification by poster - Add dispute resolution mechanism **PR Branch**: `feat/bounty-verification` **PR Title**: Feature: Add bounty completion verification **Additional Note**: Prevents fraudulent claims

top_opportunities.title: EPIC: Crew & Reputation
top_opportunities.body_preview: ## Goal Make choices stick to the player via two reputations — Infamy and Standing — and a small crew to command. ## Why it matters Reputation is how the world remembers what you did; it powers both legends and makes choices matter. Crew adds cost, care, and character. ## Rough scope - Infamy and Standing meters, persisted; world reads them (greetings, prices, who shoots first, port access) - Faction/relationship model and query hooks for ports/NPCs/encounters - Crew with morale and wages; bount

top_opportunities.title: PME-3.06.a — Bounty Manager: CRUD de bounties con fechas, recompensa, reglas y estado
top_opportunities.body_preview: > **PME-3.06.a** · App: `backoffice` · Épica: Épica 3: Moderación y CMS · US: US-3.06 **Como** admin, **quiero** crear y editar campañas de bounty con objetivo, reglas, recompensa fija, formato, fechas y estado, **para** pueda lanzar retos de contenido pagado configurables. ### Criterios de aceptación - [ ] Ruta /bounties lista bounties reales desde Prisma con name, slug, status, startsAt, endsAt, rewardCents, acceptedCount. - [ ] CRUD: crear (slug único), editar name/objective/rules/format/rewa
